programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.desc: After a big storm damages their remote research facility, they must fight for their lives as the sharks hunt them down, one by one.

programme.title: Jumanji (1995)
programme.desc: A mysterious game transports its players to the jungles of Jumanji! Thrilling effects!

programme.title: Greenfingers
programme.desc: Inmate Colin Briggs is introduced to gardening. When the prison garden attracts the attention of a gardening expert Georgina, she offers to sponsor the inmates in an upcoming flower show.

programme.title: Love's Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: The owner of a struggling organic market is forced to team up with a bad-boy celebrity chef to create a line of meal kits and revive each other's reputations.

programme.title: Words and Pictures
programme.desc: Prep school English teacher Jack Marcus (Clive Owen) meets his match in Dina Delsanto (Juliette Binoche) — an abstract painter and the new art teacher on campus.

programme.title: Five Feet Apart
programme.desc: How would love feel if you were forbidden to touch? Haley Lu Richardson and Cole Sprouse star as two young people who refuse to be defined by the obstacles that separate them.

programme.title: The Good Witch's Gift
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Cassie is surprised when Jake proposes their wedding date for Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Lost Valentine
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Susan is covering story of Caroline, who has waited 60 years for her husband.

programme.title: Decoration Day
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A grumpy man must rejoin his community when his godchild gets in trouble.

programme.title: Summer in the City
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A midwestern girl tries to adopt a big city personality with disastrous results.

programme.title: The Motherhood
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. With support from The Motherhood, Tasha rediscovers her confidence as a woman.

programme.title: Daddy's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: Ever since their divorce, Richard and Ellie have enjoyed an amicable relationship as they co-parent their daughter, Abigail. However, everything soon changes when Abigail doesn't return home from school one day.

programme.title: My Father's Other Family
programme.desc: When a DNA test reveals her late father lived a double life, Shelby meets Rose, the half sister she never knew she had. However, when his inheritance comes into play, Shelby soon fears Rose will do whatever it takes to get what she wants.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie: Betrayed by a Lover
programme.desc: A woman begs for the return of her husband after he vanishes.

programme.title: Daddy's Perfect Little Girl
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl becomes jealous when her adoptive father develops a budding relationship with a woman and her teenage son.

programme.title: Daddy's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: Ever since their divorce, Richard and Ellie have enjoyed an amicable relationship as they co-parent their daughter, Abigail. However, everything soon changes when Abigail doesn't return home from school one day.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Beneath a woman's striking beauty lies a secret that will unleash her indelible strength and skill to become one of the most feared assassins on the planet.

programme.title: The Protégé
programme.desc: Rescued as a child by the legendary assassin Moody, Anna is the world's most skilled contract killer. However, when Moody is brutally killed, she vows revenge for the man who taught her everything she knows. As Anna becomes entangled with an enigmatic killer, their confrontation turns deadly, and the loose ends of a life spent killing weave themselves ever tighter.

programme.title: Death Proof
programme.desc: Stuntman Mike (Kurt Russell) is a professional body double who likes to take unsuspecting women for deadly drives in his free time. He has doctored his car for maximum impact when Mike purposely causes wrecks, the bodies pile up while he walks away with barely a scratch. The insane Mike may be in over his head, though, when he targets a tough group of female friends, including real-life stuntwoman Zoe Bell (who served as Uma Thurman's double in "Kill Bill"), who plays herself.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: A former assassin, known simply as The Bride (Uma Thurman), wakes from a coma four years after her jealous ex-lover Bill (David Carradine) attempts to murder her on her wedding day. Fueled by an insatiable desire for revenge, she vows to get even with every person who contributed to the loss of her unborn child, her entire wedding party, and four years of her life. After devising a hit list, The Bride sets off on her quest, enduring unspeakable injury and unscrupulous enemies.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Two years after he and his Autobot friends saved the Earth from the Decepticons, Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) faces a new battle: college. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the Autobots are working with a secret military organization and trying to make a home for themselves on Earth. When an ancient Decepticon known as The Fallen rises up to wreak vengeance, Sam and his girlfriend, Mikaela, must figure out the history of the Transformers on Earth and find a way to defeat The Fallen once and for all.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) and his new girlfriend, Carly (Rosie Huntington-Whiteley), join the fray when the evil Decepticons renew their longstanding war against the Autobots. Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) believes that resurrecting ancient Transformer Sentinel Prime (Leonard Nimoy), once the leader of the Autobots, may lead to victory. That decision, however, has devastating consequences the war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battle in Chicago.

programme.title: First Target
programme.desc: A secret service agent trains long and hard to protect the president, only to realize too late that the opening of a new mountain transport in Seattle is just a ploy to ambush him.

programme.title: First Shot
programme.desc: A military rebel group resurfaces with a vengeance to assassinate the president for the death of their brothers. Agent McGregor, the head of the Secret Service, tries to prevent attacks on the president's life.

programme.title: Finding Graceland
programme.desc: En route to Memphis, Tenn., on a solemn solo road trip, widower Byron Gruman (Johnathon Schaech) picks up a disarming hitchhiker who claims to be the late, great Elvis Presley (Harvey Keitel). As Gruman opens up about the loss of his wife, Beatrice (Gretchen Mol), in a tragic car accident, his bizarre passenger becomes a surprisingly powerful source of wisdom and comfort. The duo even picks up a Marylin Monroe impersonator, Ashley (Bridget Fonda), during the surreal pilgrimage to Graceland.

programme.title: Robot and Frank
programme.desc: An aging, cantankerous ex-cat burglar finds his zest for life renewed when he trains his robotic caretaker to help him commit heists.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: In Frank Capra's acclaimed romantic comedy, spoiled heiress Ellie Andrews (Claudette Colbert) impetuously marries the scheming King Westley, leading her tycoon father (Walter Connolly) to spirit her away on his yacht. After jumping ship, Ellie falls in with cynical newspaper reporter Peter Warne (Clark Gable), who offers to help her reunite with her new husband in exchange for an exclusive story. But during their travels, the reporter finds himself falling for the feisty young heiress.

programme.title: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: Sweet-natured Alice Sycamore (Jean Arthur) falls for banker's son Tony Kirby (James Stewart). But when she invites her snooty prospective in-laws to dinner to give their blessing to the marriage, Alice's peculiar extended family -- including philosophical grandfather Martin Vanderhof (Lionel Barrymore), hapless fledgling ballerina sister Essie (Ann Miller) and fireworks enthusiast father, Paul (Samuel S. Hinds) -- might be too eccentric for the staid Kirbys.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Adaptation of the Pierre Bouelle novel about POWs in Burma forced to build a bridge to aid the war effort of their Japanese captors. British and American officers plot to blow up the structure, but the commander of the bridge's construction has different plans.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Carriers
programme.desc: Chris Pine stars in the intense and gripping thriller, Carriers. The terrifying story follows four teens who discover that they are far more dangerous to one another than the deadly global virus they are desperate to outrun.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: Moments after takeoff, Lisa's seatmate, Jackson, menacingly reveals the real reason he's on board: He is an operative in a plot to kill a rich and powerful businessman .... And Lisa is the key to its success.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: When an explorer's quest for a diamond mine ends tragically in the Congo, his father and the operation's CEO sends Dr. Karen Ross, into the jungle to continue the hunt…maybe for his son, but definitely for the diamonds.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Ex-fireman Darren McCord (Jean-Claude Van Damme) has a new job working security at the Pittsburgh Civic Arena. Hoping to impress his kids, he's scored tickets to the Stanley Cup Finals, unaware that the place has been taken over by a group of terrorists. Ex-CIA agent Joshua Foss (Powers Boothe) is holding the vice president hostage in a press box and plans to blow up the building if he doesn't pay the ransom. But, when Darren learns of his scheme, he jumps into action to save the day.

programme.title: Unleashed
programme.desc: Crime boss Bart raises orphan Danny with no knowledge of anything other than how to fight, using him as an enforcer when debts must be collected. Planning to enter Danny into a fight tournament and retire with the prize money, Bart disappears after a deadly drive-by shooting. Danny flees and takes shelter with kindly piano tuner Sam. Away from Bart's abusive control, Danny learns how to live like a human and begins investigating his past.

programme.title: The Watcher
programme.desc: The Watcher is an exciting psychological thriller that takes a unique look into the minds of both a serial killer and the man who must, reluctantly, pursue him. In an almost Hitchcockian way, the film quickly introduces us to the killer, David Allen Griffin, played by Keanu Reeves, who for many years, preyed on lonely young women in the Los Angeles area. The story is set up to create a taut cat-and-mouse game between Griffin and FBI agent Joel Campbell.

programme.title: Streets of Fire
programme.desc: Raven Shaddock (Willem Dafoe), along with his gang of merciless biker friends, kidnaps rock singer Ellen Aim (Diane Lane). Ellen's former lover, soldier-for-hire Tom Cody (Michael Paré), happens to be passing through town on a visit. In an attempt to save his star act, Ellen's manager, Billy Fish (Rick Moranis), hires Tom to rescue Ellen. Billy and Tom, along with former soldier McCoy (Amy Madigan), battle through dangerous cityscapes, determined to get Ellen back.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ruby (Jamie Chung) and Josh (Bryan Greenberg) spent an unforgettable night together in Hong Kong a year ago, and now their brief encounter is about to get a second chance.

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: Planning for Joy
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Hazel works with trivia host Theo to promote her new subscription box.

programme.title: Mr. Pawsitively Perfect

programme.title: Meet You in Scotland

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: Always

programme.title: I am The King
programme.desc: A bookish prince swaps lives with a slave, leading to chaos and his rise as King in a comic twist of fate.

programme.title: Too Hot To Die
programme.desc: Three men in a suicide club find hope and new purpose when a mysterious woman joins and changes everything.

programme.title: The Queen of Crime
programme.desc: As a meddling mom begins investigating her son's $1,000 water bill, she instinctively detects a crime behind it.

programme.title: White Lies
programme.desc: Two childhood friends partner on a lucrative hustle, oblivious to its true danger. Matters become more complicated after one develops feelings for the other's husband.

programme.title: Texas Cyclone

programme.title: Rockin' in the Rockies
programme.desc: Shorty Williams (Moe Howard) is put in charge of his cousin's ranch, but he is more concerned with becoming a prospector. He comes across two drifters (Larry Fine, Curly Howard) who just got lucky at the roulette table and befriends them as possible investors. Shorty also meets singer Betty (Gladys Blake) and her partner (Mary Beth Hughes) and convinces them to stay on the ranch along with the vagrants. Unfortunately, Shorty's cousin, Rusty (Jay Kirby), returns early and isn't pleased.

programme.title: Phantom Stagecoach

programme.title: Ridin' for Justice

He has no interest in which side may win or lose -- Kelly is far more concerned about his own survival, and about making money. He soon finds himself in the middle of the conflict, however, when a confederate colonel (Richard Widmark) captures the rancher and forces Kelly to help his soldiers steal a nearby herd of cattle, which they desperately need for food.

programme.title: Django Challenges Sartana

programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a man, eerily similar to a man he killed, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A young man takes over the duties of the sheriff, who is out of town.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney (Josh Brolin) murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross (Hailee Steinfeld) hires Rooster Cogburn (Jeff Bridges), a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf (Matt Damon) is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. Together the unlikely trio ventures into hostile territory to dispense some Old West justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are robbed while riding the stage back from a cattle sale.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas suspects a nobleman, recently arrived from England, of cattle rustling.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork and settles on a ranch adjoining Lucas'.

programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax when they adopt a horse.

programme.desc: A broken confederate soldier confronts Gen. Phil Sheridan at the McCain ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaws hunt a retired gunfighter who has settled in North Fork.

programme.desc: After a gang of men unsuccessfully attempts to lynch him for a cattle rustling crime he did not commit, Jed Cooper (Clint Eastwood) is saved by marshal Dave Bliss (Ben Johnson) and judge Adam Fenton (Pat Hingle). programme.desc: A nun confronts a town boss to help a drunkard.

programme.desc: Robbers steal a woman's dowry-stuffed hat.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques dressed in a toga? For the Julia's Caesar Salad, of course! This show has a salad for everyone, from a simple mixed green salad with a garlic vinaigrette, to classic Caesar and Nicoise (with fresh seared tuna) Salads. How about some Potato Salad? Well, Julia and Jacques prepare two: an American style potato salad with home made mayonnaise, and its tart French cousin.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: As a child, one of Julia's favorite sandwiches was an ice cream sandwich. Jacques was a stick of chocolate between two pieces of bread. Today, Julia's favorite is the Croque Monsieur, or pressed and baked ham & cheese. Of course, Jacques provides a variation he calls a Croque Madam. A close second they can both agree on is the New England lobster roll, served on a toasted hot dog bun.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Sounds rather ordinary for this celebrated duet…but here, Jacques and Julia demonstrate why Beef Burgundy and Pot Roast have beens favorite “classic” recipes (here and in France) for what seems like “forever,” and they put their own signature on it “Swiss cheese mashed potatoes” (for the Beef Burgundy), and “soft ribbon noodles” (fort the Pot Roast).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Sole food and more. One of Julia's most memorable meals was the Sole Meuniere she had on first arriving in Paris after WWII. With Jacques, she recreates this dish, as delightful as ever. The sole is followed by grilled halibut with herbed butter, and poached snapper with beautifully turned and sautéed cucumbers.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: This meal is the holiday favorite that is so good, Julia & Jacques recommend it for any day of the year. Roast Turkey with sausage and cornbread stuffing, gravy made the old-fashioned way, accompanied by creamed onions and a zesty Cranberry-Apple Chutney. The “not-quite” which has to be seen, is the inventive way the turkey is cut-up before cooking, roasted and re-assembled for serving.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Four classic soups made from scratch in Julia's kitchen: aromatic steaming hot French Onion Soup Vichyssoise, or chilled Leek and Potato soup, as well as an original variation on the theme using watercress and a hearty Mediterranean fish stew with an authentic rouille. And, because no show about would be complete without Chicken soup, we are presented chicken & noodle and chicken & rice soups.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Eggs: all sizes, all types from chicken to quail to ostrich… soft, scrambled, poached… from omelets to Frittatas to eggs Benedict…not to mention Julia and Jacques scrambling an ostrich egg as voluminous as a dozen and a half Grade A Large.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia dons safety goggles and takes up a blowtorch for this hot dessert show. Delectable Creme Caramel and creme Brulé vie for attention with creamy Chocolate Pot de Creme and Profiteroles with Ice Cream and Mocha Anglaise. This show is deliciously and elegantly decadent.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: A classic of the American table--pork chops and applesauce, is the starting point for three J&J improvisations: aromatic grilled, stuffed pork chops with rosemary, served with a tomato, red onion and avocado salad loin of pork with sautéed red cabbage and apples, and Pork Tenderloin Medallions with port wine and macerated prunes on a bed of orzo.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques share opinions, and know-how, on mussels…and, oysters, clams and shrimp. Jacques shucks, Julia sauces, and they turn out Mussels Mariniere, Billi Bi soup, and Moules Ravigots, along with a classic shrimp cocktail and mignonette sauce.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Perfectly roasted chicken says Julia, is a telltale of a really good cook. Here are three ways to perfectly roasted chicken. Whether whole rack-roasted or trussed and stuffed under the skin with a savory and shallot sauté, or butterflied and roasted with a delicate spice rub, each has a crispy golden brown skin and juicy meat that say “Hmmmm! Great chicken!”

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques demonstrate the art, and the adventure, of the Soufflé. Julia extends the classic cheese soufflé to super-height…and Jacques creates a light, fluffy, flavorful scallop and cheese soufflé in a large casserole. For dessert, a chocolate soufflé and cream roulade. Twinkies were never this good!

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin links up with his pal, Bill Darsinos, to enjoy a tradition from the heart of Bill's Greek culture when they cook a whole lamb on a spit roast.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: South Carolina Peach-Glazed Ribs with Rice Middlins
programme.desc: When Pat's friends and fellow barbecue chefs, Bryan Furman and Dr. Howard Conyers, come to town, the guys dig deep into the tricks and traditions of one of Bryan's specialties: pork ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Red Curry Braised Pork with Mustard Greens
programme.desc: Pat Martin is in the frozen tundra of Minnesota to visit his new friend, Chef Yia Vang. They brave the cold and break nearly-frozen ground to barbecue a pig's head in the earth.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Bluefin Tuna Collars with Chili Pickle Relish
programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cook a prized catch castoff cut - Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Carne Adovada.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Goat Curry with Rice Pilaf and Carmelized Onions
programme.desc: Chef Andrew butchers a whole goat, using the leg and backstrap for a braised curry.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Quail Noodle Salad and Antelope Stew
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern creates Vietnamese cold noodle salad and grilled quail. Next, chef makes antelope stew.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew butchers a whole pheasant to make yakitori-style skewers and a homemade flatbread, cucumber salad and a mango chutney.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Striped Bass Crudo and Smoky Summer Succotash
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern celebrates summer's bounty with an elegant bass crudo and a whole roasted striped bass topped with an herb-packed compound butter and served alongside a smoky corn succotash studded with charred poblanos.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern transforms wild duck into a simple grilled appetizer inspired by Japanese tataki and then uses the rest of the duck to make open fire duck noodle soup with fresh egg noodles, lots of aromatic herbs, bean sprouts and squeeze of lime.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Eggplant Caponata Toast and Crispy Squab Katsu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates an elegant, seared pigeon toast crowned with a Sicilian caponata bursting with grilled eggplant, olives, and capers and a crispy pigeon katsu served with a refreshing shaved cabbage salad and punchy ginger-carrot vinaigrette.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern champions the often-overlooked mackerel with a main salad of pickled filets, charred tomatoes, grilled frisée, and sweet summer peaches. Then, he grills it whole seasoned with caramelized onions, rutabaga mash and charred grapes.

programme.title: From Scratch: Georgian Wine On My Mind
programme.desc: In the land of wine, lamb and bread Davids mission is Chakapuli the dish that represents the start of spring. But trouble begins when he is sent up into the Caucuses Mountains on the most dangerous road in the world.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The 11 remaining women are on the brink of starvation Georgina is becoming increasingly weak from hunger and Aby is suffering from back problems as the situation gets critical, Lauren, Beth and Belinda venture into the jungle to set animal traps.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The 10 remaining women are entering dangerous medical territory one of them collapses and an emergency team is scrambled from a nearby island the group has to turn things around in the next 36 hours, or it will have to leave the island.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Overview: It's been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the world's best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell. GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: When his boss is killed, Detroit cop Alex Foley (Eddie Murphy) finds evidence that the murderer had ties to a California amusement park called Wonder World. Returning to Beverly Hills once more, Foley reunites with Detective Billy Rosewood (Judge Reinhold) to solve the case. Along with Billy's new partner, Jon Flint (Héctor Elizondo), they discover that the security force of Wonder World is actually part of a counterfeit money operation headed by park manager Orrin Sanderson (John Saxon).

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Mild-mannered Norbit (Eddie Murphy) has always had it rough, since the day he was left abandoned at a combination Chinese restaurant and orphanage. Recently forced to marry the shrewish glutton Rasputia, he is at wit's end. Then his childhood sweetheart, Kate (Thandie Newton), moves back to town, and he tries to figure out a way back to his true love.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: Upper-crust executive Louis Winthorpe III (Dan Aykroyd) and down-and-out hustler Billy Ray Valentine (Eddie Murphy) are the subjects of a bet by successful brokers Mortimer (Don Ameche) and Randolph Duke (Ralph Bellamy). An employee of the Dukes, Winthorpe is framed by the brothers for a crime he didn't commit, with the siblings then installing the street-smart Valentine in his position. When Winthorpe and Valentine uncover the scheme, they set out to turn the tables on the Dukes.

programme.title: Vampire in Brooklyn
programme.desc: In the wake of her mother's death in a mental institution, detective Rita Veder (Angela Bassett) is assigned to a baffling serial murder case. After examining the crime scene -- a corpse-filled ship found adrift at sea -- Rita meets Maximilian (Eddie Murphy), a smooth-talking Caribbean playboy determined to romance her. When Rita begins suffering from crippling hallucinations, she calls upon Dr. Zeko (Zakes Mokae), an occultist who suspects a vampire is on the loose.

programme.title: Frances Dilorenzo
programme.desc: Frances takes the stage full of energy and ready for fun. Frances does one thing you don't see many female comics do…physical humor, and she delivers it with every silly bone in her body. Her material stems from her life, but she draws both men and women into her world with such a connection, it feels like she is personalizing every joke. In addition to touring nationally, Frances Dilorinzo's credits include appearances on Nick Mom Night Out – Nickelodeon, Last Comic Standing - NBC, Comics Unleashed -ABC, Secret Life of a Soccer Mom -TLC, Real Housewives of Orange County – Bravo, as well as, performing for our troops around the world.

programme.title: Sean Peabody
programme.desc: He is often mistaken for the bouncer, security guard or bachelorette party stripper but rarely a comedian…until he takes the stage. With his passion for comedy and a personality that you can't help but be drawn to, Sean P takes any stage with a mic and makes the audience his own. Sean is immediately likable and will draw you in with his ability to tell stories that make you feel like you were there. Don't let his relaxed style fool you, he will come out blazing and have you laughing until your whole body hurts.

programme.title: Steve Soelberg
programme.desc: Extremely funny comedian and overall nice person Steve Soelberg brings an observational, story telling style of comedy which has repeatedly left his regularly sold out audiences in stitches. Whether he's relating the experiences of growing up in a large family in Seattle, Washington or recounting the time he saw an angry guy in a tutu at a Ragnar relay, he has a way of making each audience member feel as if they were just the person he wanted to tell the story to because he knew they'd enjoy it just as much as he did. Due to his growing popularity as a comedian, he has appeared multiple times on local TV affiliates (Fox, KUTV, and KSL), on the radio, and has entertained tens of thousands traveling the country not only as comedian, but also as the voice of the Ragnar relay races as their race announcer and emcee. Steve's positive, upbeat personality paired with his observational, often self deprecating humor and his ability to appeal to a broad audience guarantee his shows will be a hilarious and memorable experience for all those who attend.

programme.title: Mike Speenberg
programme.desc: Mike Speenberg has been a professional touring Stand-up comedian for 20 years. He's performed on 5 different continents, entertained everyone from Hall of Fame Athletes to US Diplomats, shared the stage with everyone from Robin Williams to Bill Burr, and been featured on everything from CNN to the AMERICAN FORCES RADIO NETWORK.

programme.title: Jeff Jena
programme.desc: Jeffrey Jena is one of the top corporate and cruise comics working today. His thirty-three years of live performance experience and over forty national television shows, both as an actor and comic give him the ability to work for any audience

programme.title: Rex Havens
programme.desc: Rex has been delighting comedy audiences for 20 years, in world-famous comedy clubs like The Improv, Catch-A-Rising Star, Funny Bones and Zanies, on television for Showtime, Comedy Central and Comic Relief, on radio with Bob & Tom and NPR, cruise ships worldwide, and corporate clients including GM, American Express, Texaco, 3M, Coca-Cola, IBM, Toshiba, Lowe's, Johnson & Johnson, Ameritech, Proctor & Gamble, State Farm, Quaker Oats, Verizon and the IRS (“Working for the IRS is the only sure way to get money from them.”), and numerous non-profit and charitable organizations, such as St. Jude's and the Make-A-Wish Foundation. A former college professor who made the unusual transition to the standup comedy stage in the '80's, Rex has always believed that laughter is the best defense against a confusing and challenging world. Rex's take on marriage and family has propelled him to performances in all 50 states and around the world, including London, Hong Kong, Amsterdam, Bermuda, Montreal, Barcelona, Copenhagen, Aruba, Rome and Cannes.

programme.title: Brandon Vestal

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water Two
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is “Wild Water” – our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the world's biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile– the area the South Americans call the “Fin del Mundo” – the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat “Northanger” to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Tornadoes
programme.desc: Ground Zero for host/adventurer George Kourounis‚ stormchasing is Oklahoma City, capital of North America's ´Tornado Alley´. George tracks a building storm that threatens that tough mid-western city, chases a hail storm, fights to get in the middle of a vicious dust-devil and the funky roadside Americana of the American Midwest.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fire and Water
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hottest & Coldest
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent – Death Valley, then the coldest – Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the world's hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | African Hellhole
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Lightning strikes, clouds roll, and rainbows fill the sky in this stormy Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Let's Explore: Polar Bears, Sea Lions, Whistling Swans and Narwhals
programme.desc: Join the Ocean Explorers crew and learn about polar bears, sea lions, whistling swans, and narwhals! Enjoy real-life footage of these majestic creatures. Discover how to count, learn about your five senses, and see the difference between large and small through narration and repetition. Sing and dance along to Polar Bear Hide n Seek, The Sea Lion Bark, and Let's Build a Nest Together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Let's Explore: Blue Footed Boobies, Tuna, Box Fish and the Coral Reef
programme.desc: Join the Ocean Explorers crew and learn about blue-footed boobies, tuna, boxfish, and the coral reef! Enjoy real-life footage of these majestic creatures. Discover right from left, shapes, prepositions and color matching. Sing and dance along to Blue-Footed Boogie, Shapes Are Everywhere, Match the Colors That You See, and Over, Under, Though Around.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn about Dogs, Cats and More
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy says "Eh-oh" and runs off to find the other Tubbies. They watch some children make fantastic animals from papermache.

programme.title: Teletubbies

She envisions a small, simple production—until she hears about a gigantic production of “Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins” that's a smash hit in Berry Big City. She becomes convinced that unless she does the same play in the same grand scale, she'll be the laughing stock of the berry bitty theatrical world! Plum races the play into production.

Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Tuff McTruck Trail // Lori's Talent // The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery enter a famous endurance race, they end up faced with a rescue mission to save their idol himself, the toughest truck around! // When the Fender Bend Quarry needs help, Rev tries to convince Lori and Tipper to share their...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: After many years of working hard on Accelerator Acres, Tilly the tractor is ready to retire from ranch life. Rev wants to find her the perfect new job, but his ideas are too intense for old Tilly. He'll have to adjust to her slower pace first. // Rev and the gang compete for the title of Best Prankster-except Lori sits out, claiming pranks aren't her thing. After a full day of pranks and laughs, the kids gather for the big party that Lori planned for them...but all is not as it seems!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Stella And Sam
programme.desc: As they explore the world in all its seasons, Stella and Sam have wild adventures and comical mishaps. They make friends and discover many things - especially about themselves. If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Kongsuni and Friends
programme.desc: For five-year-old Kongsuni life is one big adventure. Whether it's at home, in school, or on the playground.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met
programme.desc: Everyday Henry meets something new - The day Henry met a Whale! The day Henry met the Moon!, The day Henry met a Car! How exciting, I wonder what Henry's going to meet today?

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: All aboard the learning express! Ted is a train who teaches children about colours, animals, fruits, vegetables and more.

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: Step into a world of Soothing Melodies like Hey Diddle Diddle, Hush Little Baby, and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics

programme.desc: A whimsical journey through time with timeless nursery rhymes that dance and sing, bringing joy to little hearts

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: This wonderful collection of classic rhymes has Miss Polly Had A Dolly, Baa Baa Black Sheep & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Tap your feet to Pin Pon, 5 Little Buses and Mary had a little lamb in this fun musical episode!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Get grooving with a medley of fun kids songs like Dinosaur Song, Fruits Song, and Colors Song

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 7
programme.desc: Annie, Ben and Mango find themselves on Japan's Rabbit Island, where the king of bunnies challenges Ben to a race. We've all heard the story of the hare and the tortoise! Will Ben be the slow and steady one? Or will he snooze and lose?

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben - Episode 1
programme.desc: There's a Dragon's pearl hunt on Great Wall with Annie, Ben & Mango! Get ready for a fun adventure!

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Heebo-Skeebo: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

Now Tibbs and Biggie D have to race to find the crook and get Shaq's priceless painting back. / Fleming reluctantly takes care of a lost dog, and learns that a dog can be a car's best friend. So when the dog's real owners are found, Fleming is reluctant to say goodbye.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - My Frozen Friend / Night Beat: On a cold and cloudy day Gronk is driving through the mountains for fun when he finds an abominable snowman frozen in a block of ice. An excited Gronk begins to drive back to the garage to show the rest of the Shaq Paq, but his new friend is soon discovered by the Orlanta News. Gronk has to make the tough decision to let this new friend go back home in the mountains to keep him safe. / Tibbs wants to be just like her favorite character from the TV series Night Beat, Officer Cool, so she and Dawkins decided to patrol the streets of Orlanta with mixed results.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

Gathering the rice should be no problem, however, when the sticky rice comes alive, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble find themselves in a sticky situation! Can they get the rice they need to the kitchen to the Cooking Countdown, or will the tricky stick rice plants chase them out of town? / The Bumble Nums are making a Chilly Cherry Cheesecake and need nine chilly cherries of different sizes! Once the cherries chill to the proper temperature, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble get to picking! The recipe calls for three small cherries, three medium cherries, and three big cherries. Can they gather the right sizes and get the ingredients to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? / The Bumble Nums are making Boogie Down Baba Ganoush and need four boogieing eggplants! So, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble break out their best dance moves to get the eggplants moving and help catch them! But, how can they get the ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? Maybe a boogie down conga line will work?

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making delicious Boomerang Banana Splits and need three boomeranging bananas! Humble, Grumble, and Stumble believe catching boomeranging bananas is so easy! But, is it? Can the Bumble Nums bag the three bananas they need in time for the Cooking Countdown? / Mmm. Today, the Bumble Nums are making Mouthwatering Mac and Cheese! They need to wrangle six speedy cheese wheels from the barn. After a wild ride corralling the speedy cheese wheels, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble must race the secret ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown. Will they make it in time to make their mouthwatering meal?

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: When Pants the puppy tries to save the day as a superhero, he worries everyone has a super power but him. Mittens helps Post Pig Petunia deliver a special birthday cupcake the Mayor baked for Nanna Ribbit. But will they get it to her on time? Pants and Popcorn have fun digging the best hole ever, but when they forget to fill it in, Post Pig Petunia falls in and scatters her mail everywhere.

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger Series
programme.desc: Welcome to my vlog! I share information about my life, inspirations and favorite things!

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger Series
programme.desc: Stacie dares Barbie to do the "Eat It or Wear It Challenge."

programme.title: Learn and Play with Cowboy Jack
programme.desc: Where Does Recycling Go for Kids is a dive into what happens to our recycling once it gets picked up from our bins! Did you know that your recycled goods are sorted both by machine and by hand to make it to their destination where they are turned back into consumer goods and other products? Cowboy Jack is gearing up with a hardhat and high visibility vest to learn all about it!

programme.title: Total Drama Ridonculous Race
programme.desc: Our nine remaining teams make their way to Alberta, Canada to compete in a bull buster of a challenge.

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: The Eurasian BEAVER is a keystone species. / DJ RED the robin redbreast might just be the world's favourite bird. / HUMPDY is a majestic HUMPBACK WHALE. / A small and quick diving bird, LADY KING, the electric blue kingfisher perches high above the slow-moving waters of rivers and streams. / BIG SONNY the mammoth Ocean Sunfish is super unique in appearance and style. / WILLY-T teaches us in his song, “I'm the white-tailed Eagle”, that these eagles where once a species of concern- they were almost extinct, but now they are making a comeback!

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: MISS MABEL, the Eurasian MAGPIE, is one of the world's most intelligent creatures, she can even recognize herself in the mirror! / Don't get it twisted, DR NEWTON ain't no lizard he is a sleek stylish SMOOTH NEWT who likes the quiet life of slow-moving waters. / MC JACKY T is a rare NATTERJACK TOAD with a big voice! / HYPA HYENA, the cool spotted hyena from sub-saharan Africa, invites us to laugh along with her as we learn cool hyena facts. / The size of a house cat, LIL' P is a funky phat PINE MARTEN on the rise! On her track “The Pine Rhyme” she lets us know that she adores feasting on fruit, insects, small animals too, BUT her favourite food are bilberries, whose blue colouring turns her poop blue!!! / SIR FEATHAZ & LADY FEATHAZ are noisy and gregarious COMMON STARLINGS. They show us that they are very sociable birds, experts at mimicry and of course experts at mesmerizing aerial displays.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alexandria mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una anciana ayuda a Maggie y Negan a escapar de los zombis y los conduce hasta su tribu, a la cual los soldados del Croata tratan de exterminar. Negan revela que conoce al Croata: trabajó a sus órdenes hasta que lo expulsó por ser demasiado sádico.

programme.desc: Exploramos cómo los animales que viven sobre o bajo tierra afinan sus sentidos para sobrevivir en el complejo mundo bajo nuestros pies

programme.title: Comunicación

programme.title: El Ordovícico
programme.desc: Durante el Ordovícico hubo una explosión de vida bajo el mar que provocó que varias criaturas extrañas evolucionaron.

programme.title: El Devónico
programme.desc: La vida en el mar aumentó mucho en el Devónico hasta que casi todo fue aniquilado en la segunda extinción masiva de la Tierra.

programme.title: El Ataque del Hongo Zombie
programme.desc: Los hongos son la base de la cadena alimenticia y recicladores en el ciclo de vida. Pero también predadores, y existen más de los que conocemos.

programme.title: Un Gran Mundo en un Pequeño Jardín
programme.desc: Martin Dohrn observa los movimientos casi imperceptibles de los insectos que pueblan su jardín, desde abejas hasta activas arañas y más.

programme.title: Oso pardo
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, rastrea a un oso pardo macho que incursiona por primera vez en Yellowstone Spring luego de su hibernación invernal.

programme.title: Bisonte
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, nos acerca al magnífico bisonte. Caminamos por el camino del bisonte con una de las manadas que regresa a Yellowstone.

programme.title: Puma

programme.title: Serpientes
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, encuentra un nido de serpientes de cascabel invernando en las tierras hostiles de la pradera de Wyoming.

programme.title: El Pérmico
programme.desc: Los cambios geológicos masivos permitieron que se produjeran carnívoros voraces con dientes de sable como el gorgonopsia y el helicoprion.

programme.title: El Triásico
programme.desc: Después del Pérmico, surgen los primeros dinosaurios, plesiosaurios y pterosaurios. Una erupción volcánica provoca la extinción del 75%

programme.title: El Cretásico
programme.desc: Dinosaurios magníficos como triceratops y tiranosaurios dominaban el Cretácico, la edad dorada, hasta el impacto devastador de un asteroide.

programme.title: Apocalipsis de insectos
programme.desc: Una disminución en las poblaciones de insectos podría devastar toda la vida en la tierra. ¿Qué la causa y se puede hacer algo para detenerla?
